Video.summary: Selina recently met Lee at the mall and while their love has blossomed, she's got a serious secret - she's really a man! Then D's visits to the local pool have gotten him into hot water after sleeping with the lifeguard.
Video.title: Transsexual Takedown

Video.summary: For the past 5 years, Trisha has been having a secret affair with her mother's boyfriend, Don! Next Daniel regrets the day he agreed to a threesome because now he's about to lose his fiancee forever.
Video.title: Mom, I'm Marrying Your Man!

Video.summary: Shianne confronts the stripper she says is destroying her marriage; stripper Candy wants a threesome with her two female co-workers.
Video.title: Springer Strip Off

Video.summary: These guests say they are willing to betray family and friends in their quest to find a lover.
Video.title: Angry Lovers Attack!!

Video.summary: Paige disapproves of her sister's boyfriend and devises a plan to get her to leave him; another woman may foil Derek's plans to make his girlfriend a permanent part of his life; Tony wants his cousin's girlfriend.
Video.title: I Was Set Up!

Video.summary: Taylor's here to reveal that he's been cheating on Jenna with another girl and her stripper cousin! Then, it's a sibling rivalry for the ages when Cody finds out that his girl Amanda has been cheating on him with his own brother Brandon!
Video.title: Your Tears Mean Nothing

Video.summary: Cousins Anthony and Brandon have been seeing each other in secret for the past year. Then, Chris is here to tell a secret to his on-again off-again girl Crystal.
Video.title: Gay Cousins In Love

Video.summary: Meme wants to have an exclusive relationship with Te; Acadia objects to Lauren and Crystal getting married; Jenna can't decide between Savannah or Deina.
Video.title: Lesbian Sex and Candy

Video.summary: RJ has to choose between the rockstar lifestyle or settling down with his girlfriend Elaina. Janyce learns her roommate Angel has been sharing her man David! Fed up with Stacy, Brandon lets her in on a little secret!
Video.title: I'm A Rockstar, Baby

Video.summary: Justin says that Ashley's so overbearing and protective that it drove him to cheat on her with her lifelong friend Erica. Then, Tina is here to confront her sister Ruthie for cheating with her man Tony.
Video.title: Crazy In Love

Video.summary: Morgan literally dumps his fiancé at the altar for his secret lover, Victor! Next, John is leaving his fiancé, Jamie, now that his ex-wife wants him back! Later Dave is furious with his niece because she is engaged to a man of a different race.
Video.title: Outrageous Wedding Confessions

Video.summary: Megan's sister knows something that could change her mind about her cheating boyfriend; Princess admits to having feelings for her ex; Brad's girlfriend wonders why his attitude toward her has changed.
Video.title: Baby Daddy Denial

Video.summary: Matt’s latest affair with Danielle’s mom’s roommate could be her mom’s breaking point! John has been experimenting with his roommate Ray behind Mahogany’s back! Rich is ready to ditch Tina for her more mature mom Shelly!
Video.title: I Want A Divorce!

Video.summary: Wayne doesn't know his fiancee, Kristin, is sleeping with her cousin! Next Springer Cam is there when JB drops the bomb on both of his girlfriends and tells them he's been cheating. Later Vinnie is sleeping with his best friend's fiancee, Shannon.
Video.title: Engagements Explode!

Video.summary: Bobbie wants to end an online affair with a woman named Encore; Andrew's tiny mistake may end his relationship; Brieanna may have contributed to her boyfriend's affair with her co-worker.
Video.title: Sexperiments Backfire

Video.summary: Iris threw her husband, Wayne, out of the house during a fight, but she never expected he would find a new love so soon. She will confront her husband's new lover, Janie, a woman born with no hands and no feet.
Video.title: You Can't Tear Us Apart!

Video.summary: Angelica is unapologetic about sleeping with her twin's boyfriend; Makayla confronts the woman with whom her children's father hooked up; Stormy wants to take a shower with her friend Jessica.
Video.title: Steamy Sister Sex

Video.summary: D'Handsome wants to call off his engagement; Jeff wants a threesome; Jamie's boyfriend hooked up with another woman.
Video.title: Smothered ... With Sauce

Video.summary: Antoine has been hiding the fact that he is gay from his family and his girlfriend. Now he wants to let them know the truth, and furthermore that he has been having a relationship with his sisters boyfriend.
Video.title: A Gay Family Affair

Video.summary: Lisa's husband, Mickey, moved his mistress into their house 3 months ago! Then LaTasha's boyfriend, Maurice, has been cheating with transsexual Day Day! Maurice says it's over with Day Day, but much to his surprise, LaTasha won't take him back!
Video.title: Heartless Affairs!

Video.summary: Emani says she will do anything to win back her ex-boyfriend, but her best friend tells her why she should not; Davita's husband has a confession to make; Shannon challenges her boyfriend's other woman to a wrestling match.
Video.title: Bestie Blindside

Video.summary: Richie will tell Shelly he has been sleeping with DeeDee, a transsexual and Lesley, a transgender female. Then Gina will confess to her boyfriend, Rob, that she is sleeping with his best friend, Joe!
Video.title: Naughty Lovers Confronted

Video.summary: Angelo is here to tell his girlfriend that he's a woman. Next, Mikey brought his girlfriend here to tell her that he's been cheating on her. But she has surprise of her own. Later Jennifer feels she must tell her lover the truth about her sexuality
Video.title: I'm Lying to my Lover

Video.summary: After Marcus got out of prison, he found his calling with the lord and quickly established himself as a minister. But he hasn't exactly freed himself of trouble, because he's been sleeping with two women, Nay and Strawberry!
Video.title: Sex With Two Sisters!

Video.summary: Khristal's significant other does not take kindly to Billy's advances; a secret revelation puts a kibosh on April's marriage; Meghan wants to reunite with her online boyfriend, who confesses to having had an affair.
Video.title: I Paid Your Girlfriend for Sex

Image.alt: I Paid Your Girlfriend for Sex
I Paid Your Girlfriend for Sex
I Paid Your Girlfriend for Sex

Video.summary: Tyla learns she has a lot to be concerned about in her relationship with Tiger; Glen feels he is under constant surveillance; Marshelle has been posing as a lesbian.
Video.title: Bisexual Bombshells

Video.summary: Black wants to leave his fiance Justine to be with a woman named Star. But he's about to find out that Star is actually a man. Then, Jay has lo reveal to Brittany the shocking secret that he slept with her sister Donna.
Video.title: Weddings...Crashed!

Video.summary: Nick is here to tell his soon to be wife Ashley that he's been cheating on her with two different women! Plus, Shea is here and worried sick that her husband Adam may have had a little too much fun on a recent trip the couple took together.
Video.title: Stripper Spring Fling

Video.summary: Alex refuses to lose his ex-girlfriend without a fight; CeeCee needs to reveal her true identity to her online crush; Kyle and his sister have secrets to confess.
Video.title: You're Not Man Enough

Video.summary: Chyna confronts her backstabbing "friend"; Jarod says the stress of being the sole breadwinner for his family has driven him down the path of adultery; Derrick proposes to his ex-girlfriend, who is already married.
Video.title: Proposals Backfire

Video.summary: Lynne kicked her husband out for cheating and now he's living in her front yard in a box! Next Sam says he's always wanted to see 2 women sleep together so he made a peculiar agreement with his cousin.
Video.title: I Live In A Box!

Video.summary: Amanda's a workaholic mother losing her grasp on a 3rd marriage and in desperate need of help.Then Daniel's learning that all it takes to ruin an engagement is one bad night as his brief love affair with his fiancee's mother is back to haunt him!
Video.title: Mad Mom Meltdown

Video.summary: Greg will reveal to his girlfriend, Deidra, that he secretly works as a gay, male escort. Next Madrina's boyfriend keeps cheating on her with his ex­. Then Ro-Ro has two girlfriends and today they'll force her to choose between them.
Video.title: Secret Sex Lives
